comment.body:
Upside pivot is 6279.50; above this zone we can see a gamma squeeze up to 6300, but the pivot is a strong support/resistance into the afternoon, especially after 2.10PM.

If it is above 6265 (same time interval, strong pivot), then 6275 is a big magnetic lvl.
